data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for computed availability/expiry status.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the computed availability/expiry status for portal queries. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps indicate successful operations but do not provide concrete evidence related to the availability or expiry status, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming computed availability/expiry status for portal queries.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the computed availability/expiry status.
